title: OpenAI Embedding Node truncates vectors to 192 dimensions
symptom: The OpenAI Embedding Node returns vectors in 192 dimensions instead of the expected 768 dimensions. This occurs despite the embedding models returning the correct dimensions when tested directly.
root_cause: The OpenAI Embedding Node is designed to work with specific OpenAI embedding dimensions (256, 512, 1024, etc.). When a dimension not in this list is used, the node truncates the vector to 192 dimensions, which is a quarter of 768, indicating a processing issue in the node's pipeline.
fix_steps: Switch to the Embeddings Ollama node if available and compatible with your setup.
If using the OpenAI node, switch the Dimensions field to Expression mode and manually enter '768'.
agent_instruction: Try using the Embeddings Ollama node or manually set the dimension to 768 in the OpenAI node.
